qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Docs generate API allows attacker-controlled recursive deletion through output.schemas and clean
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The advisory fixes unsafe string interpolation in `packages/mcp/src/index.ts` when `verbOption.summary` and `operationName` are emitted into generated `server.tool(...)` code. This finding instead concerns docs API forwarding of `output.schemas` and `clean` into filesystem cleanup and schema-writing paths.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Docs generate API allows remote execution of local transformer modules through output.override.transformer
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The advisory root cause is unescaped OpenAPI metadata embedded into generated MCP server source in `packages/mcp/src/index.ts`. This finding instead routes docs API input into `output.override.transformer` and then into `dynamicImport(...)` in the verb-options pipeline.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Docs generate API allows attacker-controlled writes outside the intended output file via output.workspace
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The advisory is a code-injection bug in MCP server generation from unescaped OpenAPI `summary` data. This finding instead concerns docs API propagation of `output.workspace` into `write-specs.ts`, which creates `workspace/index.ts` outside the intended target path.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: None of the final qualifying findings identifies the advisory's vulnerable code or root cause. The advisory is a code injection in `@orval/mcp` caused by embedding unescaped OpenAPI `summary` and `operationName` values into generated JavaScript in `packages/mcp/src/index.ts`, while the session's qualifying findings all concern docs-playground output configuration handling.
evidence: The published fix wraps `verbOption.operationName` and `verbOption.summary` with `jsStringEscape(...)` inside `packages/mcp/src/index.ts` `generateServer`, which pins the advisory to unsafe string interpolation during MCP server code generation.

`docs_api_arbitrary_schema_clean_delete` describes `output.schemas` plus `clean` flowing from `docs/src/pages/api/generate.js` into `removeFilesAndEmptyFolders(...)` and schema writers, not into `packages/mcp/src/index.ts`.

`docs_api_transformer_module_execution` describes `output.override.transformer` reaching `dynamicImport(...)` in `packages/core/src/generators/verbs-options.ts`, not unescaped summary emission in the MCP generator.
`docs_api_workspace_arbitrary_write` describes `output.workspace` causing `packages/orval/src/write-specs.ts` to create `workspace/index.ts`, not code injection through OpenAPI metadata.
